CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Activity_Levels__c,'Daily or multiple times per day'), IMAGE("/resource/Activity_Level_Red", "Red"), IF (ISPICKVAL(Activity_Levels__c,'2 - 3 times per week'), IMAGE("/resource/Activity_Level_Yellow", "Yellow"), IF( ISPICKVAL(Activity_Levels__c, '1 time per week') , IMAGE("/resource/Activity_Level_Green", "Green"), '')))
CustomField.label: Activity Levels Temperature
